title: viguiera goebelii
intro: Viguiera goebelii, also known as tree daisy or golden daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viguiera goebelii include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Viguiera goebelii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
